_comment: Bundled daily-theme pool for THE BOARD (Codex). The committed offline fallback for the anniversary/holiday feed (see G2 blocker): the app derives the day's theme from this file by calendar date with ZERO network. 'md' = UTC MM-DD; 'boardThemeKey' MUST be a key in lib/themes.ts THEMES (== pipeline BOARD_THEME_KEYWORDS); 'match' = lowercase keywords used to float on-theme clues to the front of the board. A large pool so days feel fresh — many more dates than there are visual skins. Nightly pipeline may augment from Wikipedia 'On this day'; this file is authoritative offline.

anniversaries.name: New Year's Day
anniversaries.blurb: The calendar turns — a fresh page for the whole parlor.

anniversaries.name: Newton's Birthday
anniversaries.blurb: Gravity, calculus, and a very famous apple.

anniversaries.name: Wikipedia Day
anniversaries.blurb: The encyclopedia anyone can edit turns another year.

anniversaries.name: Inauguration Watch
anniversaries.blurb: Ceremony and power — a day for the record books.

anniversaries.name: Mozart's Birthday
anniversaries.blurb: A prodigy's overture opens the year.

anniversaries.name: Groundhog Day
anniversaries.blurb: The shadow decides — an omen for the weeks ahead.

anniversaries.name: Dickens' Birthday
anniversaries.blurb: Great expectations and a city of fog.

anniversaries.name: Edison's Birthday
anniversaries.blurb: A thousand failed filaments and one bright idea.

anniversaries.name: Valentine's Day
anniversaries.blurb: Torch songs and love letters fill the room.

anniversaries.name: Galileo's Birthday
anniversaries.blurb: He pointed a lens at the heavens and changed everything.

anniversaries.name: Pluto Discovered
anniversaries.blurb: 1930 — a ninth world (for a while) joins the map.

anniversaries.name: Friendship & Flight
anniversaries.blurb: 1962 — John Glenn orbits the Earth.

anniversaries.name: Steinbeck's Birthday
anniversaries.blurb: Dust, roads, and the great American novel.

anniversaries.name: Bell's Telephone Patent
anniversaries.blurb: 1876 — 'Mr. Watson, come here.'

anniversaries.name: Pi Day / Einstein
anniversaries.blurb: 3.14 and the birthday of relativity itself.

anniversaries.name: The Ides of March
anniversaries.blurb: 'Beware' — Rome's most famous betrayal.

anniversaries.name: St. Patrick's Day
anniversaries.blurb: Parades, green, and a very old legend.

anniversaries.name: Equinox & Migration
anniversaries.blurb: Day meets night — the world tips toward spring.

anniversaries.name: Robert Frost's Birthday
anniversaries.blurb: Two roads, and the one less travelled.

anniversaries.name: April Fools' Day
anniversaries.blurb: Nothing is quite what it seems today.

anniversaries.name: Yuri's Night
anniversaries.blurb: 1961 — Gagarin becomes the first human in space.

anniversaries.name: Titanic Remembered
anniversaries.blurb: 1912 — the unsinkable ship meets the deep.

anniversaries.name: Midnight Ride
anniversaries.blurb: 1775 — 'The British are coming.'

anniversaries.name: Earth Day
anniversaries.blurb: A day for oceans, forests, and the blue marble.

anniversaries.name: Shakespeare Day
anniversaries.blurb: The Bard's birthday — all the world's a stage.

anniversaries.name: Jazz Under Lamplight
anniversaries.blurb: Smoky rooms and a saxophone's blue note.

anniversaries.name: Star Wars Day
anniversaries.blurb: May the Fourth — a galaxy far, far away.

anniversaries.name: Cinco de Mayo
anniversaries.blurb: Music, color, and a hard-won victory.

anniversaries.name: Freud's Birthday
anniversaries.blurb: Dreams, slips, and the shadowed mind.

anniversaries.name: Lindbergh Takes Off
anniversaries.blurb: 1927 — a lone flight across the Atlantic.

anniversaries.name: Towel Day
anniversaries.blurb: Don't panic — a salute to a certain Hitchhiker's Guide.

anniversaries.name: Everest Summited
anniversaries.blurb: 1953 — Hillary and Tenzing reach the roof of the world.

anniversaries.name: D-Day
anniversaries.blurb: 1944 — a coast, an armada, a turning point.

anniversaries.name: World Oceans Day
anniversaries.blurb: The trench, the tide, and everything below.

anniversaries.name: Bloomsday
anniversaries.blurb: One Dublin day, immortalized by Joyce.

anniversaries.name: Waterloo
anniversaries.blurb: 1815 — an empire meets its final field.

anniversaries.name: Summer Solstice
anniversaries.blurb: The longest day — ancient stones align.

anniversaries.name: Antoni Gaudí's Birthday
anniversaries.blurb: Curves, color, and cathedrals like coral.

anniversaries.name: Independence Day
anniversaries.blurb: Fireworks, brass bands, and a founding document.

anniversaries.name: Bastille Day
anniversaries.blurb: 1789 — a fortress falls and a republic rises.

anniversaries.name: Apollo 11 Launch
anniversaries.blurb: 1969 — the Moonshot leaves the pad.

anniversaries.name: Moon Landing
anniversaries.blurb: 1969 — 'one small step,' and the world watched.

anniversaries.name: Hemingway's Birthday
anniversaries.blurb: Bullfights, marlins, and a very short sentence.

anniversaries.name: Emily Brontë's Birthday
anniversaries.blurb: Wild moors and one stormy love.

anniversaries.name: Herman Melville's Birthday
anniversaries.blurb: Call me Ishmael — and beware the white whale.

anniversaries.name: First Website Online
anniversaries.blurb: 1991 — the World Wide Web opens to the public.

anniversaries.name: Napoleon's Birthday
anniversaries.blurb: A general, an emperor, an exile.

anniversaries.name: Krakatoa Erupts
anniversaries.blurb: 1883 — an island roars and the seas answer.

anniversaries.name: The Dream Speech
anniversaries.blurb: 1963 — words that carried a movement.

anniversaries.name: Great Fire of London
anniversaries.blurb: 1666 — a city burns and is reborn.

anniversaries.name: Voyager 1 Launch
anniversaries.blurb: 1977 — a golden record heads for the stars.

anniversaries.name: Magellan's Return
anniversaries.blurb: 1522 — the first crew to circle the globe limps home.

anniversaries.name: Roald Dahl Day
anniversaries.blurb: Golden tickets and giant peaches.

anniversaries.name: Hobbit Day
anniversaries.blurb: Second breakfast and a very long journey.

anniversaries.name: T. S. Eliot's Birthday
anniversaries.blurb: The waste land and a hollow hush.

anniversaries.name: Sputnik Launch
anniversaries.blurb: 1957 — a beeping sphere opens the Space Age.

anniversaries.name: 007 Debuts
anniversaries.blurb: 1962 — a spy with a licence to thrill.

anniversaries.name: Columbus Landfall
anniversaries.blurb: 1492 — sails on the horizon of a new map.

anniversaries.name: Battle of Trafalgar
anniversaries.blurb: 1805 — Nelson's fleet, and a signal to remember.

anniversaries.name: Edison's Lightbulb Test
anniversaries.blurb: The lab glows late into the night.

anniversaries.name: The Nautilus Launched
anniversaries.blurb: 1954 — the first nuclear submarine slips beneath.

anniversaries.name: Halloween
anniversaries.blurb: Masks, shadows, and things that go bump.

anniversaries.name: Sistine Chapel Unveiled
anniversaries.blurb: 1512 — a ceiling that stops the breath.

anniversaries.name: Gunpowder Plot
anniversaries.blurb: Remember, remember — a plot beneath Parliament.

anniversaries.name: Berlin Wall Falls
anniversaries.blurb: 1989 — a wall comes down and a city exhales.

anniversaries.name: Armistice Day
anniversaries.blurb: 1918 — at the eleventh hour, the guns fell silent.

anniversaries.name: Monet's Birthday
anniversaries.blurb: Water lilies and light on the pond.

anniversaries.name: Mickey Mouse Debuts
anniversaries.blurb: 1928 — Steamboat Willie whistles into the world.

anniversaries.name: Darwin's Origin
anniversaries.blurb: 1859 — one book, an entire tree of life.

anniversaries.name: C. S. Lewis's Birthday
anniversaries.blurb: A wardrobe, a lamppost, a lion.

anniversaries.name: Rosa Parks' Stand
anniversaries.blurb: 1955 — a seat kept, a movement moved.

anniversaries.name: Nobel Prize Day
anniversaries.blurb: Medals for the year's brightest minds.

anniversaries.name: Beethoven's Birthday
anniversaries.blurb: Ode to joy and a symphony for the ages.

anniversaries.name: First Flight
anniversaries.blurb: 1903 — the Wright brothers leave the ground.

anniversaries.name: Winter Solstice
anniversaries.blurb: The longest night — starlight over frozen fields.

anniversaries.name: Christmas Day
anniversaries.blurb: Carols, bells, and a night of wonder.

anniversaries.name: Kipling's Birthday
anniversaries.blurb: Jungle law and the ships that sail east.
